.nav-file-title-content::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgba(248, 248, 248, 0.6) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body::before.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #ffffff 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#ffffff, color-mix(in srgb, #ffffff 65%, transparent))
body::before.--file-header-font: '??', '??', '??', ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
body::before.--font-default: ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
body::before.--font-interface: '??', '??', '??', ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
body::before.--font-mermaid: '??', '??', ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
body::before.--font-monospace: '??', '??', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, "Consolas", "Source Code Pro", monospace
body::before.--font-monospace-default: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, "Consolas", "Source Code Pro", monospace
body::before.--font-text: '??', '??', ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
body::before.--metadata-input-font: '??', '??', '??', ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
body::before.--metadata-label-font: '??', '??', '??', ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
body::before.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #ffffff 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#ffffff, color-mix(in srgb, #ffffff 65%, transparent))
body::before.--raised-mask: linear-gradient(white, white) padding-box, linear-gradient(white, white) border-box
body::before.--raised-mask-background: linear-gradient(to bottom left, white, transparent, white) border-box no-repeat
body::before.--xfa-unfocused-field-background: url("data:image/svg+xmlcharset=UTF-8,<svg width='1px' height='1px' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='100%' height='100%' style='fill:rgba(0, 54, 255, 0.13)'/></svg>")
body::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) url("") repeat scroll 0% 0% / cover padding-box border-box
body::before.font-family: "??", "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

body.styled-scrollbars::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) url("") repeat scroll 0% 0% / cover padding-box border-box
body.styled-scrollbars::before.font-family: "??", "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgba(28, 28, 28, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgba(28, 28, 28, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h1[data-heading=\"This is a heading 1\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
h1[data-heading=\"This is a heading 1\"].font-family: "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgba(28, 28, 28, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: color(srgb 0.54032 0.3608 0.9592 / 0.4) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgba(28, 28, 28, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgba(28, 28, 28, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: rgba(28, 28, 28, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
